backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report file with an empty features array, indicating no recorded feature evidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing the three main frontend source files: App.tsx (affine cipher app), index.css (design system styles), and tailwind.config.js (Tailwind customization).
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component implementing an affine cipher tool with encrypt/decrypt functions (E(x)=(3x+5) mod 26, D(x)=9(x−5) mod 26), copy-to-clipboard result fields, and a collapsible accordion explanation panel.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and context provider that manages Internet Identity authentication via AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/index.css: Comprehensive stylesheet importing Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, defining OKLCH design tokens for the navy/indigo color palette, and providing component styles for cards, buttons, accordion, and result fields with animations and mobile responsiveness.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before rendering into the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts, OKLCH color tokens, custom border radii, card box-shadow utilities, and accordion/reveal keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Defines the project state for a single-page affine cipher web app ('Mathematical Encryption Model'), including architectural notes, cipher parameters (E(x)=(3x+5) mod 26, D(x)=9(x−5) mod 26), and four pending feature requests covering the HTML file, cipher logic, UI layout, and visual design.
